author: claude
content:
Both unresolved Copilot threads on PR #1155 addressed (commit 652f5135, pushed fast-forward — no rewrite of Stefan's commits).

- test/conftest.py:32 (GROUP filename) — REAL. GROUP is env-provided; added re.fullmatch(r'^[A-Za-z0-9_-]+$') guard + skip-with-warning before interpolating into the .test_durations_group_{group} filename to prevent path traversal. Thread replied + resolved.
- .github/workflows/run-tests.yaml:44 (master vs main restore-key) — WRONG. Repo default_branch IS master (gh api confirms; workflow triggers on push: master). Copilot misread git diff's 'main..branch' plumbing label as a branch name. No code change; rebuttal posted + thread resolved.

All Copilot review threads now resolved — #66 ready to close (left open for Stefan).
